# AlphaOmega

> Free, all-in-one test prep for SAT, PSAT, ACT, AP, GED, MCAT, GRE, LSAT, K-12 assessments and more — with adaptive AI practice, multiplayer battles, and 50,000+ original questions.

AlphaOmega ("One App, Every Test") helps students prepare for high-school, college, K-12, and professional exams in a single calm, ad-free interface. Practice adapts to skill level, mistakes feed a personal coaching engine, and progress is tracked through streaks, mastery maps, and score predictions.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Personalized study dashboard with daily practice and goals.
- [Landing](/landing): Product overview and free signup.
- [Why It Works](/why-it-works): The learning science behind adaptive practice.
- [Key Principles](/key-principles): Study principles and how to use the app effectively.
- [Quiz](/quiz): Mixed adaptive practice across selected exam.
- [Math Practice](/math): Math-only practice quizzes.
- [English Practice](/english): English / reading & writing practice.
- [Daily Challenge](/daily): Today's curated practice set.
- [Topic Mastery](/mastery): Mastery breakdown by skill and topic.
- [Elite Practice](/elite-practice): Hardest-tier questions for top scorers.
- [Practice Test](/practice-test): Full-length timed practice tests.
- [AP Tests](/ap-tests): AP exam practice across all subjects.
- [Pro Exams](/pro-exams): MCAT, GRE, LSAT, GMAT and other professional exam prep.
- [Score Predictor](/score-predictor): Predicted score based on recent performance.
- [Leaderboard](/leaderboard): Global and friends leaderboard.
- [Achievements](/achievements): Badges, streaks, and milestones.
- [Flashcards](/flashcards): Spaced-repetition flashcard study.
- [Mistake Journal](/mistake-journal): Review and re-practice past mistakes.
- [Study Coach](/coach): AI study coach and personalized plan.

## Optional

- [Auth](/auth): Sign in or create a free account.
- [Install App](/install): Add AlphaOmega as a PWA on iOS / Android / desktop.
- [Starter Kit](/starter-kit): Free downloadable starter materials.
